name: Lemon Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the chicken on medium heat in oil until cooked through and golden brown. Remove and keep warm.
2. Pour lemon juice into the pan and whisk over medium heat to deglaze the pan.
3. Add pepper and oregano to the sauce and continue whisking.
4. Add mushrooms and stir until they are cooked through.
5. Stir in sour cream, sugar, and cornstarch. Continue whisking until the mixture is thickened.
6. Pour over the chicken breasts and serve.
